zh.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy是David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis和Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick的女兒，於1507年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素。她和Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1593年3月14日在義大利維圖特雷維索梅登亞 迪 利文沙穆斯享年86歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋桑哈爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy是David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis和Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick的女儿，于1507年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素。她和Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1593年3月14日在意大利維圖特雷維索梅登亞 迪 利文沙穆斯享年86岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋桑哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

en.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy was born in 1507, in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland as the daughter of David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis and Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. She had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. She died on 14 March 1593, in Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 86, and was buried in Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy est née en 1507, à Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, fille de David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis et Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1593, à Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy wurde 1507 in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, als Tochter von David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis und Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick geboren. Sie hatte mit Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. März 1593 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Italien und wurde in Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy è nata il nel 1507 nel Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland come figlia di David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis e Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. Morì il 14 marzo 1593, nel Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedyは1507年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカプリントン カストルでDavid Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of CassilisとAgnes William Borthwick of Borthwickの娘として生まれた。彼女はWillem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquharとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1593年3月14日にイタリアベンエトートレヴィソメダナ ジー リベンザムアで86歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイサンクハーにて埋葬された。

ko.Sanquhar, Dumfries And Galloway, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 산크하르
ko.Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto: 이탈리아 븐토 트레비소 메던아 디 라이븐자 머
ko.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy(은)는 1507년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 캡링턴 카스틀에서 David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis(와)과 Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 3월 14일 이탈리아 븐토 트레비소 메던아 디 라이븐자 머에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 산크하르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy nasceu em 1507, em Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland filha de David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis e Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1593, em Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Itália, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy родилась в 1507 г. в местности капрингтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis и Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. Она умерла 14 марта 1593 г. в местности мур, медуна ди ливенза, тревисо, винето, Италия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности санкухар, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Catharina Kennedy nació en 1507, en Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland como hija de David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis y Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas con Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1593, en Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
